channel.title: Projects on William Melander
channel.description: Recent content in Projects on William Melander

item.title: Warframe Movement Controller
item.author: william.melander@gmail.com (William Melander)
item.description: Specialisation project, recreating Warframe’s Motion Controller, along with a simple Third Person Camera.

item.title: Developer Console
item.author: william.melander@gmail.com (William Melander)
item.description: Developer Console Tool used for debugging, testing, and active development.

item.title: ARPG : Spiteful Hangover
item.author: william.melander@gmail.com (William Melander)
item.description: ARPG using “Diablo 3” as a reference. A tale of a drunken viking saving the world!

item.title: Isometric Adventure : Cannibal Crossing
item.author: william.melander@gmail.com (William Melander)
item.description: Isometric adventure game, using the game “Tunic” as reference, with the artstyle of Animal Crossing and the brutality of Doom.

item.title: Platformer : D4RK
item.author: william.melander@gmail.com (William Melander)
item.description: Platformer with “Celeste” as a reference game. A cyberpunk city that has lost its power due to mysterious circumstances.

item.title: Phone Puzzle Game : Checkmate
item.author: william.melander@gmail.com (William Melander)
item.description: Puzzle game made for Android using Unity, based off “Lara Croft Go” and adding Chess to the mix!
